## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Local checks run (`make dev-check` or `make backend-check` + `pytest backend/`) or rationale provided.
- [ ] Risks and rollback notes considered for non-trivial changes.

## Tests

- [ ] New tests added or existing tests updated to cover the change.
- [ ] If no tests: rationale provided (e.g. docs-only change, migration-only, covered by `manage.py check`).

## Decisions

- [ ] No new architecture decisions introduced — OR — decision(s) recorded in `DECISIONS.md` before merging.
- [ ] Decision IDs referenced in commit messages where applicable (e.g. `feat: add X (DEC-003)`).

## Continuity / Docs Checklist

- [ ] `DEV-SESSION.md` updated if this changes ongoing context.
- [ ] `DECISIONS.md` updated if a planning/architecture decision changed.
- [ ] If session commands changed, both quick cards were updated in the same commit:
  - `README.md`
  - `CONTINUITY-CHECKLIST.md`
